search_queries_used: site:nice.org.uk NG136 ABPM average measurements confirm diagnosis result review
site:dha.gov.ae hypertension ambulatory blood pressure review
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: The clinician must validate data quality, context, thresholds, and diagnosis.
No medicine, target, dose, referral, or management decision was generated.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Adults with completed ABPM being reviewed by a clinician.
setting_applicability: Primary or outpatient result review; pregnancy, paediatric, inpatient, and emergency blood-pressure pathways are outside scope.
UAE_applicability: International NICE evidence requires UAE diagnostic thresholds, device standards, referral, and facility-policy adaptation.
recency_verification: Current NICE NG136 page last updated 2026-02-26 was reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: NG136 is the current NICE hypertension guideline.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact NICE section supports documenting ABPM source, date, measurement schedule, averages, clinician interpretation, symptoms, questions, and an entered plan without automatically diagnosing hypertension.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting repeated clinic readings, ABPM or HBPM source and averages, result context, annual measurement in relevant diabetes care, and clinician review without automatically diagnosing hypertension.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Severe blood-pressure referral features were reviewed as clinician-assessed prompts; no generic red-flag item was mapped because the legacy wording is broader than this section.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting measured severe blood pressure plus assessed retinal, neurological, chest-pain, heart-failure, kidney-injury, or phaeochromocytoma features as prompts, never as automatic conclusions.

unresolved_source_gaps: Device and calibration, indication, wear time, measurement count, daytime and night-time periods, average values, artifacts, diary, symptoms, clinic comparison, interpretation, diagnosis, target, treatment, referral, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
